AccountSwitch.hint: Demo mode. Your Teams sign-in is unchanged. Clear to use your own account.
AccountSwitch.loginHint: Optional: choose whose data to load after you sign in, then use Sign in with Teams.
AccountSwitch.loginSaved: Saved — sign in with Teams to continue.

Landing.title: Speak Up and Recognize Positive Ownership
Landing.description: A safe internal platform for employees to raise concerns early and acknowledge peers who show ownership. Improve transparency, trust, and accountability within your team.

safe.title: Safe & Anonymous
safe.description: Submit concerns without fear. Optional anonymity ensures every voice is heard.

peer.title: Peer Recognition
peer.description: Highlight excellent performance and ownership. Build a culture of appreciation.

rapid.title: Rapid Feedback
rapid.description: Get internal signals directly to decision makers to resolve blockers fast.

Dashboard.title: Team Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Your personal sanctuary for team clarity, focus, and connection.

concerns.title: My Concern
concerns.subtitle: View and track the concerns you've submitted.
concerns.emptyHint: When you submit a concern, it will appear here with status and any replies.
concerns.teamEmptyHint: Concerns submitted by your project team will appear here.

staff.subtitle: Track your personal signals and what’s happening on your team projects.
staff.sentimentEmpty: No signals on your projects in this window yet.
staff.ctaHint: Opens My Concern with the full form.
staff.teamEmpty: No recent signals on your shared projects.

management.subtitle: View global trends and signals across squads and projects.
management.rangeNote: KPI trends compare the last 30 days to the previous 30 days.
management.kpiSquadsHint: Projects that have at least one assigned team member
management.sentimentHint: Share of concerns by issue category in the last 30 days (when categorized).
management.sentimentEmpty: No categorized concerns in this period.
management.leaderboardHint: Points = achievements + appreciation posts in the last 30 days.
management.leaderboardEmpty: No recognition activity in this period.
management.healthHint: Average signal sentiment per project (last 30 days). Healthy ≥ 75, watchlist 50–74, critical below 50. Projects with no signals in the window are counted as watchlist.

squadLead.subtitle: Monitor and manage the health and sentiment of the squads you lead.
squadLead.sentimentHint: Average sentiment per project you lead.
squadLead.issueHint: Distribution of concern categories for your squads.
squadLead.statusHint: Current state of concerns in your squads.
squadLead.leaderboardHint: Members with highest recognition points in your squads.

Unauthorized.title: Access Denied
Unauthorized.description: You are trying to access a protected area. Please sign in to continue or return to the landing page.

Form.title: Speak Up or Recognize a Peer
Form.detailsPlaceholder: Add enough context so others can take action.
Form.error: Please fix the errors in the form.
Form.unauthorized: Unauthorized. Please sign in to submit a signal.

Projects.label: Team Projects
Projects.title: Ongoing Projects
Projects.subtitle: Track and manage your team's tactical and strategic ownership initiatives.
